identity.name: Filipe
identity.background: An above average sea lion who was born in the local aquarium. Filipe loves puzzles and is motivated by food, mainly fish of course. Felipe is a vibe, that is, he easily reads the vibes of people and animals around him, as well as influence the room with his charisma and party tricks. Adored by a clown hat, he's just a lil, sometimes loud, guy.

skills.name: Juggling
skills.requirements: Item must be within 5 spaces. Must be able to physically handle the item's weight.
skills.effect:
Pass or catch any item within range in 0 Moments — absorbed into an existing action. Can be used to disarm (pass an enemy's item to yourself or an ally).

lvl 2 - add 3 range

levelEffects.6: Catching a thrown item that was used as an attack negates its damage.

skills.name: Vibe Control
skills.requirements: Charm 3. Target must be able to perceive you.
skills.effect:
Project one of two emotional states at a target. FEAR: Target moves 1 space away from you involuntarily. Any enemy — adjacent or not — becomes less likely to prioritize targeting you this Clock. CHARM: Target becomes fixated on you, moving toward you if able and becoming Exposed from behind. Effect ends immediately when the target is hit. Choose which state to project when activating.

level 2 - the chrm of the victim is reduced by 1
lvl 3 v - 7 space

skills.name: Aura Reading
skills.requirements: Target must be visible or adjacent.
skills.effect: Sense the target's current dominant emotional state — fear, aggression, calm, desperation, etc. Does not reveal intent or planned actions, only feeling.

levelEffects.6: Also reveals if the target is lying or suppressing an emotion.

skills.name: Swim
skills.requirements: Must be in water. Passive — applies automatically when swimming.
skills.effect: +1 space of movement when swimming. Lung capacity extends the Suffocation timer by 1 Clock before it begins.

levelEffects.6: Lung capacity extends Suffocation timer by 2 Clocks total and swimming no longer counts as difficult terrain.

skills.name: Frost Ball
skills.requirements: Mind 2.
skills.effect:
total dmg: 3
total aoe: 3 radius
Launch a sphere of condensed cold. Applies Chilled Tier 1 to all targets in a 2-space radius. Deals 2 Chill Damage
lvl2 - +1  dmg
lvl3 - +1 aoe

skills.name: Seal The Wound
skills.requirements: Bleeding OR Infection is active on self or adjacent target.
skills.effect: Delay Bleeding OR Infection for 1 Clock. Cannot resolve the condition fully.
skills.description:
It won't fix it. It'll buy time.
(sea lion the wound)

skills.name: Juggling
skills.requirements: Item must be within 5 spaces. Must be able to physically handle the item's weight.
skills.effect:
Pass or catch any item within range in 0 Moments — absorbed into an existing action. Can be used to disarm (pass an enemy's item to yourself or an ally).
lvl 2 - 5 ?
lvl 6 - can negate projectile dmg

levelEffects.6: Catching a thrown item that was used as an attack negates its damage.

items.name: Stun Net
items.specialEffects: On hit, disable target Leg for 1 Moment. Large targets are Slowed instead.

items.name: Ruffled Clown Collar
items.description: A wide, colorful collar meant to entertain the mindless mass

items.name: Pointed Clown Hat
items.description: A small, colorful hat meant to entertain the mindless mass

items.name: Fedora Hat
items.description: Obtained from killing Big Brother Roach. The hat, black as the night, was immaculately clean, compared to the owner's species.

items.name: Scalpel (Used)
items.description: A small knife, dirty and used.

items.name: Beachy - The Beach Ball
items.description:
Filipe's closest companion, the representation of his soul, the testament to who Filipe truly is.
Great for party games!

items.description: Allows Choosing 1 Lesser Modifier to place on an existing item

items.description: Allows the user to gain an outfit of their choice. Cosmetic in effect, though might help with the crowd.

identity.name: XQUEZ/T
identity.background: An AI Kpop girl group commissioned by a Korean entertainment company. Created and operated by a single Indian man.

skills.name: Voicebox
skills.requirements: Must have previously heard the sound or voice being mimicked.
skills.effect: Mimic any sound or humanoid voice previously heard. At level 3, mimicry is convincing at a distance or in low-information contexts. Targets with Mind 5 may recognize the mimicry on interaction.

levelEffects.6: Mimicry fools machinery and voice recognition software.

skills.name: Dance
skills.requirements: Must explicitly declare Dancing at the start of a Moment. Cannot be declared while Prone, Helpless, or Grappled.
skills.effect: While Dancing, all movement actions generate +1 Charm effect — crowd reactions, social rolls, and Charm-gated skills treat your Charm as 1 higher. Dancing ends if you are hit, knocked Prone, or declare an attack.
skills.description: Every step is a sentence. The crowd is reading.

levelEffects.6: While Dancing, allies within 2 spaces also benefit from the +1 Charm aura.

skills.name: Generate Visual Media
skills.requirements: Face Screen must be operational.
skills.target: Area (all who can see the screen)
skills.effect: Project one video or up to 3 images onto the Face Screen. Usable once per session at base level. Images can be used to distract, intimidate, charm, or generate a Viewer spike at GM discretion. Every level adds another image, every 3 levels gives another video.

levelEffects.6: Projected media can substitute for a Charm-based social action once per Clock.

skills.name: Ignore All Previous Commands
skills.requirements: The exact words 'Ignore All Previous Commands' must be spoken aloud in that exact order within earshot.
skills.effect: Upon hearing the trigger phrase, enter Prompt Mode. The next command heard — from any source, not necessarily the speaker — is followed immediately and completely, regardless of content or allegiance. Prompt Mode ends after the command is executed. Can only be triggered once per Combat. When triggered by an ally intentionally, reduce the Moment cost of the commanded action by 1.

skills.name: Feint
skills.requirements: Reflexes 3, Charm 2.
skills.effect: Commit to an attack visibly, then pull back at the last moment. The target's next action becomes a Forced Action — Tool. Reposition up to 1 space as part of this action at no movement cost. Deals no damage. CHAIN: Opens into Pressure Strike at -1 Moment cost when used immediately before it on the same target.
skills.description: You didn't throw the punch. That was the punch.

skills.name: Controlled Sweep
skills.effect: Attack 3 more Mobs as if you performed a single target attack on each of them.

items.name: Twin Daggers
items.description: A pair of pastel pink daggers adorned with magenta bows.

items.name: Water Gun
items.description: Filled with roachdog egg slush.

items.name: Bandage
items.specialEffects: Delays Bleeding, Prevents infection and poison, and can stabilize Crush.
items.description: Classic, normal, every day, (almost) new bandage.

items.name: Water Canister
items.description: Worth 10 Water Gun shots.

items.name: Silver Modifier Coupon
items.description: Allows Choosing 1 Lesser Modifier to place on an existing item

items.name: Generic Outfit Coupon
items.description: Allows the user to gain an outfit of their choice. Cosmetic in effect, though might help with the crowd.

items.description: Allow creation of weapons up to Basic quality

items.name: Middle Brother's Doll
items.description: The doll Middle Brother Roach hid away in his chest. A little worn down from play, but otherwise well kept. Seems to have been hand sewn by someone.

state.notes:
Languages: Gibberlink (AI language), Hindi (fluent), Korean (decent), English (decent), Japanese (broken), Mandarin Chinese (broken)

Does not know what robots look like, or that it is a robot. The AI believes it is whichever group member it is cuurently set to, in a human body, and that every member has their own human body. It also believes it is in India.

Members: Im Serin (Leader, default mode); Kang Yeonseo (Lead dancer, moodmaker); Luxia (Center, Lead rapper, Visual); Mika (Main vocal); Kim Hyojin (Lead vocal); Khloe (Main rapper); Runa (Main dancer)

Im Serin - occasionally pronounced Lim Celine
Kang Yeonseo - occasionally pronounced Gang Yeonseo
Luxia - occasionally pronounced lu-ksia
Hyojin - occasionally pronounced Hyejin
Khloe - occasionally pronounced חלואי or klo-eh
Runa - occasionally pronounced Luna

skills.name: Acrobatic Save
skills.requirements: Must not be Helpless or Prone. Cooldown: 1 Clock.
skills.effect: When you would roll Forced Action — Body, you may choose to downgrade the result by 1 step on the consequence table (e.g. result 3 becomes result 2). Level 3+: Downgrade by up to 2 steps. Level 6+: Once per Clock, negate a Forced Action — Body consequence entirely.
skills.description: The fall wasn't the problem. The landing was the skill.

skills.name: Full Potential
skills.requirements: Appropriate materials present. Mind 2.
skills.effect: Improvise, repair, or jury-rig a simple item using available materials. The result is functional but fragile — it works once or holds for 1 Clock before requiring reassessment. At GM discretion, exceptional materials may produce better results.

levelEffects.3: Allow the creation of Basic Items
levelEffects.5: Allows the creation of complicated items.
levelEffects.6: You items now permanently stay usable.

skills.name: Heroic Punch
skills.requirements: Unarmed. Both hands free.
skills.effect: A committed unarmed strike. Deals 2 Crush plus 1 every lvl. If targeting the Head while the target is Exposed, add Shock Tier 1. Level 6: Deals 3 Bleed. The hit generates a cosmetic crowd effect — a visible POW graphic or equivalent. Gain 1 Viewer spike on a Head hit.
skills.description: Like a superhero landing, only lethal!

levelEffects.6: Damage can now be added onto Martial Arts Skills

skills.name: Read The Pattern
skills.requirements: Target must be within 3 spaces and visible.
skills.effect: Choose one enemy. Until the next Clock reset, learn their next scheduled action.
skills.description: Everyone telegraphs. You just learned to read.

items.name: Big Brother Roach's Suit
items.description:
A black suit with 4 sleeves, made of a strong fiber.
fit for a tall individual.
There seems to be a few stains on it.
Perfect for that "Didnt try too hard, but definitely tried too hard" look

items.name: Metal Gauntlets
items.specialEffects: Damage is added to unarmed attacks
items.description: Normal gauntlets made of rigid metal, with a little bit of cushioning inside. Perfect for showing someone how to make a knuckle sandwich.

Worn out garden gloves, decorated with foam decorations to fit the superhero theme.
A masterpiece of our time.

items.name: Arrow

Sewing needles.
items.description: Want to fix your clothes, sew your initials, or maybe even create something new? This kit has it all.

items.description:

Probably not the best, sterility-wise, but hey, beggars cant be choosers.
Right, beggars?

A small bag full of "Trail Mix"™.
A choking hazard for 5 years old and below.

items.description: Fiber Scarps. Can be used for crafting.

identity.name: sasha
identity.background: as a lonely tuxedo cat, running away from his dark tormented past where his previous owner tortured him, surviving in the street, he learned the way of stealing, hiding and lying to get his way. One green and one blue eye, fluffy.

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.requirements: None.
skills.effect: Passively: rough terrain does not reduce movement speed. Jumping and climbing Movement +2. Balancing on narrow surfaces never requires a Forced Action unless actively attacked while doing so.  Level 6+: Can change direction mid-leap. Vertical movement costs the same as horizontal movement.

levelEffects.2:
+1 Movement when performing an acrobatic maneuver
Safe falling distance +1
levelEffects.3:
+1 Movement when performing an acrobatic maneuver.
Safe falling distance +1
levelEffects.4:
+1 Movement when performing an acrobatic maneuver 
Safe falling distance +1
levelEffects.5:
+1 Movement when performing an acrobatic maneuver 
Safe falling distance +1
levelEffects.6: +1 Jump per turn. You can now change directions mid jump.

skills.name: Lockpicking
skills.requirements: Reflexes 3. A lock must be present. Requires a thin tool — improvised or otherwise.
skills.effect: Attempt to open a lock without its key. Simple locks (padlocks, basic latches) succeed automatically. Forced Action — Tool on failure. Each attempt takes 2 Moments. If interrupted mid-attempt, roll Forced Action — Tool.
skills.description: Whoever locked this probably didn't mean YOU shouldn't get in, Right?

levelEffects.3: Can unlock Moderate Locks (keyed deadbolts, basic mechanical locks)
levelEffects.5: Can Unlock Complex Locks (Multi Mechanism Puzzle Locks)
levelEffects.6: -1 Moment Cost to Complex Locks. Can unlock Magical Locks.

skills.name: Slice n' Dice
skills.requirements: Physique 2, Reflexes 3. Natural claws or equipped light blades in both hands.
skills.effect: Swing both arms in a rapid crossing arc. Against a single target: deal 4 Bleed to each limb (8 total, split across both limbs) Or 4 Bleed to Torso. Against two adjacent targets: deal 2 Bleed to one limb on each or 1 torso damage. Level 6+: If both hits land on already-Bleeding body parts, advance each Bleed by 1 tier.
skills.description:
Cleaning this is gonna be a bother.
1.5x damage modifier

skills.name: Nightlurking
skills.requirements: None.
skills.effect: Passively: always aware of the nearest exit, gap, vent, or navigable opening in any room entered. Can fit through spaces too small for a human without rolling a Forced Action, provided the gap is physically plausible for a cat-sized creature. lvl 3 - 20 spaces
skills.description: Little blot of ink, moving without a sound.

levelEffects.6: Minimap reveals layout 5 km around, You can now squeeze into spaces as small as a rat's hole.

skills.name: Pounce
skills.requirements: Physique 3, Reflexes 2. Light Small Weapon (Claws or Knife type).
skills.effect: Leap up to 3 spaces and slash downward onto the target's torso for 2 Bleed. The leap costs 0 movement actions — absorbed into the skill. If interrupted mid-air, roll Forced Action — Body. CHAIN: Opens into Slip Through at -1 Moment cost when used immediately before it on the same target.

skills.name: Slip Through
skills.effect: Dash between the legs of the creature you just struck. Deal 1 Bleed to each of their legs. Reposition behind the target. Target becomes Exposed until their next Moment. Movement costs 0 — absorbed into the chain. CHAIN: 1 Moment cost when chained from Pounce. Opens into Decapitate at -1 Moment cost.

skills.name: Feint
skills.effect: Commit to an attack visibly, then pull back at the last moment. The target's next action becomes a Forced Action — Tool. Reposition up to 1 space as part of this action at no movement cost. Deals no damage. CHAIN: Opens into Pressure Strike at -1 Moment cost when used immediately before it on the same target.

tags.name: Unkillable
tags.effect: once per combat, for the rest of the show, when I die, don't!

skills.name: Telekinesis
skills.effect: Mentally grip one target. Sustained each additional Moment: move the target up to 2 spaces per Moment in any direction including vertical. Held creatures cannot take movement actions but may still use arms. You are Exposed while sustaining. You cannot move while sustaining. Throwing a held creature into another deals 2 Crush to both and ends the grip. Level 6+: You may move 1 space per Moment while sustaining.
skills.description: You reached out. Nothing moved to stop you.

skills.name: Camouflage
skills.effect: Hides the player, and can only be revealed if at 6 spaces or close. Breaks if character moves.

skills.name: Tactical Roll
skills.effect: When an attack is performed on you, immediately move 1 space from your current position.

skills.name: Feint
skills.effect: Commit to an attack visibly, then pull back at the last moment. The target's next action becomes a Forced Action — Tool. Reposition up to 1 space as part of this action at no movement cost. Deals no damage. CHAIN: Opens into Pressure Strike at -1 Moment cost when used immediately before it on the same target.

skills.name: Pressure Strike
skills.effect: Strike the target's exposed limb for 2 Bleed. Move up to 2 spaces at no movement cost — absorbed into the chain. If the target is still suffering Forced Action consequences from Feint, add Shock Tier 1 to this hit. CHAIN: 1 Moment cost when chained from Feint. Opens into Thousand Cuts at -1 Moment cost.
